codeReview.summary: The fix resolves the prior Scheme/Racket/Clojure/Common Lisp symbol-extraction blockers by replacing parse-only coverage with real symbol assertions and adding dedicated S-expression extraction paths, but it does not fully resolve the Nginx detection blocker from the prior scrutiny round.

issues.description: The Nginx fix is still incomplete. `from_filename()` now recognizes only the literal `nginx.conf` (`types.rs:229-235`), but `.conf` still maps to `Ini` in `from_extension()` (`types.rs:297`) and both indexing paths still resolve language as filename override first, then extension fallback (`crates/vera-core/src/indexing/update.rs:241-250`, `crates/vera-core/src/indexing/pipeline.rs:238-249`). As a result, real Nginx files such as `conf.d/site.conf` or `sites-enabled/default.conf` remain classified as INI, so the original Nginx stats/filtering failure from `lang-tier2b-and-finalize` is not fully fixed.

`extract_scheme_define()` and `extract_racket_define()` still label every `define` form as `SymbolType::Function` (`extractor.rs:1171-1173`, `1218-1221`). When the form is a variable binding like `(define x 42)`, the helper now extracts the name but misclassifies the symbol type; the new Scheme variable test only checks the name (`extractor.rs:3051-3057`) and there is no equivalent Racket variable-binding test.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation-worker skill still requires manual verification for language work, but this fix session recorded none of the required manual-verification commands while the handoff still claimed `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: `/home/lamim/Development/Tools/Vera/.factory/skills/implementation-worker/SKILL.md:42-45` requires `cargo build --release` plus creating a test file, indexing it, and checking `vera stats`. The transcript skeleton for worker session `65cd26fa-54d3-4eae-8b3a-f6c5b0d528d1` contains no `cargo build --release`, `vera index`, `vera stats`, or `vera search --lang` commands, and the handoff JSON for this feature lists only Cargo test/clippy/fmt plus targeted unit tests while `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` is `true`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared state still does not document the repo-specific pattern that flat S-expression grammars may need custom `collect_symbols()` handling instead of the usual `classify_node()` path.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: The fix itself adds dedicated `collect_symbols()` branches for Scheme/Racket/Clojure/Common Lisp (`crates/vera-core/src/parsing/extractor.rs:873-907`) and the handoff explicitly suggests documenting that pattern (`handoffs/2026-03-22T08-58-27-782Z__lang-symbol-extraction-fixes__65cd26fa-54d3-4eae-8b3a-f6c5b0d528d1.json:103`). `.factory/library/architecture.md` has tree-sitter integration notes, but no mention of this extractor pattern.

summary: Reviewed the fix handoff, transcript skeleton, prior scrutiny reports, shared-state files, and commit `114ab61`. Scheme/Racket/Clojure/Common Lisp extraction is materially fixed, but the review still fails because only the exact filename `nginx.conf` was added; general `*.conf` Nginx files still fall back to INI classification.
